description_long: This house features a steeply pitched thatched roof and a prominent cylindrical tower with a conical roof, reminiscent of medieval European architecture. The exterior walls are white with exposed wooden beams, giving it a classic half-timbered appearance. The main structure has two visible stories, with the upper story slightly overhanging the lower. Windows are small and multi-paned, with a distinctive hexagonal window on the gable end. The base of the house is constructed from stone, providing a sturdy foundation. The entryway is sheltered and slightly recessed, with a small overhang and stone steps leading up to the door.
description: A medieval-style house with a thatched roof, cylindrical tower, and half-timbered white walls. Features small multi-paned windows and a stone foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with two windows, thatched roof, and the base of the tower visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hexagonal window on the gable end and the full height of the cylindrical tower.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tower's wooden texture and metal bands, with a single window on the main building.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the tower and the gable end with the hexagonal window, emphasizing the house's asymmetrical design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with small multi-paned and hexagonal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with small overhang, stone steps, and a simple wooden door
